name: No One Survives 1 minute
description: No One Survives 1 minute is a fast-paced endless survival runner. Dodge incoming barriers, keep distance from the dragon, and stay alive as long as possible. Collect stars and chests to increase score, level up your core, and gain stronger shield regeneration. Every 60 seconds triggers a victory pulse. Practice mode unlocks after 3 defeats to help players improve before full-speed runs.
instructions: Desktop Arrow keys WASD to move hold left mouse and drag to steer Press Enter to start or retry Press P in ready menu to toggle Practice mode after unlock Mobile Touch and drag to move Tap to start or retry
